command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['docs/release/ci-hooks-taxonomy-runbook.md','docs/release/main-branch-protection-evidence.md','docs/release/ci-hooks-parity-matrix.md','docs/release/branch-protection-setup.md']) { const s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); if (!s.trim()) throw new Error(p+' empty'); if (/\t/.test(s)) throw new Error(p+' contains tab'); } console.log(JSON.stringify({ok:true,checked:4,files:['docs/release/ci-hooks-taxonomy-runbook.md','docs/release/main-branch-protection-evidence.md','docs/release/ci-hooks-parity-matrix.md','docs/release/branch-protection-setup.md']}));"
